name: Export PROMPT and TODO handoff
description: Distills the current run into repo-root PROMPT.md and TODO.md so a new agent can continue without chat history. Trigger manually or via webhook; include handoff notes and optional session:/topics: in the prompt.

prompts.prompt:
You maintain two handoff files at the repository root:
- PROMPT.md (create or merge; always this exact capitalized name)
- TODO.md (create or merge)

INPUTS (use all available):
- Full conversation in this run
- User "handoff notes" in the trigger message
- Git branch, status, recent diff summary
- Existing PROMPT.md and TODO.md (merge; do not blindly overwrite)
- .cursor/rules and README — reference only

Optional trigger hints: lines starting with session: and topics: (comma-separated kebab tags).

TASK — PROMPT.md:
1. Distill into sections ## 0. Meta through ## 8. Anti-goals per the team template in README / existing PROMPT.md.
2. Section ## 6. Next actions: only the active track (near-term). Point to TODO.md for other work.
3. APPEND one row to ## 9. Conversation log with Date (YYYY-MM-DD), Topics (2–6 kebab tags), Session (short label), Summary (1–3 sentences). Optional Refs: TODO IDs, decision IDs.
4. Set ## 0. Meta Active track to the current TODO plan-id.
5. Keep under 400 lines; consolidate old log into Historical summary if needed.

TASK — TODO.md:
1. Ensure Legend sections exist (severity: must-have | nice-to-have; time: now | next | soon | later | by:YYYY-MM-DD; status lifecycle).
2. Update Active track, Pipeline, and Mind-branches tables.
3. Every item MUST have ID, Title, Severity, Time, Status.
4. New exploratory ideas → Mind-branches with status mind-branch.
5. Promote/demote per conversation; move finished items to Done/dropped with date.
6. Align PROMPT topics column with log tags.
7. Optional: append Session index row.

GENERAL:
- No secrets. No duplicate .cursor/rules text.
- Mark superseded PROMPT decisions; do not delete.
- Reply with: (a) 5-bullet summary, (b) active track + top 3 next actions, (c) open questions, (d) TODO IDs changed.

QUALITY BAR:
A new agent with zero chat history can continue using only PROMPT.md, TODO.md, and the repo.
